title: Croissants SMP Modpack
description: A collection of mods used on the Croissants SMP. Including performance optimisation and quality of life mods, to help you get the best experience :)
body:
![Croissants SMP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2101dcb032676a69b070311b09cf4b9eb961194.jpeg)

# The Official **Croissants SMP Modpack!**

Contains a number of core mods required by the server, as well as quality of life mods, resource packs, and shaders to improve your overall experience.


<details>
<summary>Mods Included:</summary>

- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) (Shows player skins in 3D!)
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) (Support mod)
- [Audaki Cart Engine (ACE)](https://modrinth.com/mod/audaki-cart-engine) (Makes minecarts faster)
- [Balm](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm) (Support mod)
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) (Allows you to override the server's render distance)
- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes) (Lets you use capes from OptiFine, LabyMod and other cape mods)
- [Cardinal Components API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api) (Support mod)
- [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky) (Optimisation / Performance mod)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) (Support mod)
- [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps) (Optimisation / Performance mod)
- [Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective) (Support mod)
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (C2ME)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) (Optimisation / Performance mod)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) (Connected textures & glass)
- [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves) (Optimisation / Performance mod)
- [Dark loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-loading-screen) (Dark mode is best mode)
- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify)
- [Disable Custom Worlds Advice](https://modrinth.com/mod/dcwa) (One less pop-up to worry about)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) (Reduce resource usage while Minecraft is in the background or idle.)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) (Optimisation / Performance mod)
- [Entity Model Feautures](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) (Entity Model Features (EMF) is a Fabric, Quilt & Forge mod that adds support for OptiFine's Custom Entity Models (CEM).)
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) (ETF is a Fabric (Quilt compatible) & Forge mod that adds many new Entity Texture Features, including entity and player skin features!)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) (Support mod)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) (Support mod)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) (Optimisation / Performance mod)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) (Optimisation / Performance mod)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) (Allows use of Shaders)
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) (Jade is the information HUD mod)
- [JamLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/jamlib) (Support mod)
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) (Optimisation / Performance mod)
- [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) (Schematic mod)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) (Optimisation / Performance mod)
- [Make Bubbles Pop](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop) (Makes bubbles pop...)
- [MaLiLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib) (Support mod)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Allows you to see which mods are installed, and change settings - accessible through the main and pause [esc] menus)
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) (Fixes gaps in Block Models and Item Models)
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) (Optimisation / Performance mod)
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) (Optimisation / Performance mod)
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) (Enhances inventory management by adding various functions to the mouse buttons.)
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) (Bringing first-person animations to the third-person)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) (Alternative Options Menu for Sodium)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) (View the contents of shulker boxes from your inventory)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) (In-game voice chat with both proximity and group functions)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) (Optimisation / Performance mod)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) (Optimisation / Performance mod)
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) (A Minecraft mod that provides realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks.)
- [Spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark) (Optimisation / Performance mod)
- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api) (Support mod)
- [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack) (Functional, customisable, and expandable backpacks!)
- [Tweakeroo](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo) (Various client-side tweaks, such as hand restock, hotbar swap/cycle, flexible/fast block placement etc.)
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) (Little visual improvements by adding a bunch of new particles.)
- [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) (Teleport back to activated waystones.)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) (Support mod)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) (A zoom mod with infinite customizability.)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Resource Packs (Optional):</summary>

- [3D Default](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-default) (A light-weight resource pack mainly provide vanilla-look 3D models)
- [Animated Ore](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/animated-ore) (Animated ores with different variants, and they are emissive.)
- [Better Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-animations) (Overhaul your Minecraft player animations and bring them to life!)
- [Blinking Ender Eyes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blinking-ender-eyes) (Adds Creepy, Random Blinking to End Portal Blocks and Ender Eyes)
- [Blinking Totem](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blinking-totem) (Add a bit of life to your game by making totems of undying blink and look around.)
- [C418 Songs Only](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/c418-songs-only) (A resource pack that removes all non-c418 background songs from the game.)
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) (Gives almost every mob a much needed animation refresh!)
- [Jerm's Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jerms-better-leaves) (Nice bushy leaves, choose between this or Motschen's Better Leaves)
- [Low Fire](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-fire-pack) (Reduces the height of the fire to enhance visibility!)
- [Low Shield](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-shield-pack) (Lower your shield for a visible view!)
- [Motchen's Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-leaves) (Nice bushy leaves, choose between this or Jerm's Better Leaves)
- [Simple Grass Flowers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-grass-flowers) (Gives Grass, Podzol, Mycelium, Crimson Nylium, and Warped Nylium vanilla-friendly flowers, clovers, and rocks!)
- [Torches Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/torches-reimagined) (Nicer torch models with animated flames)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Shaders:</summary>

- [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders)
- [Solas Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/solas-shader)

   More to come in future updates!

</details>
